title: CBC: SmallShells
description: Makes shells and cannons from CreateBigCannons and CBC:MW smaller
body:
Resourcepack dedicated for people who wish for CreateBigCannons and CBC:MW big cannons and shells to be smaller. Reduces the size of all cannons except wooden cannon, perfect for tank building.

Most textures were adjusted to match new model size. Some textures were changed artistically (APDS), original textures and models by CBC, CBC:MW and other featured addon mod developers.

Feedback and bug report appreciated.
